prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京大学医学部为985、211、双一流高校，依托北京大学整体平台，软科主榜排名全国第2（2026年），属国内最顶尖学府层次，对上海顶尖考生吸引力极强；北京大学2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面，涉及校园安全、招生空档等舆情；但抖音综合热度排名第3（高热），短视频曝光量极大，整体报考关注度仍维持高位。2025年湖北提前批出现招生空档，对上海考生心理影响有限；临床医学A、口腔医学A、基础医学A、药学A+、护理学A+、公共卫生与预防医学A，医学学科群实力全国顶尖，口腔医学为该校在沪招生专业，学科评估A级，对高分考生有极强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业社会热度持续偏热，口腔医学为热门方向；上海市2026年高考总人数约66700人，较2025年（49276人）大幅增长约35%，竞争基数显著扩大，顶尖段竞争进一步加剧。省控线（本科批402—405）保持稳定；北京大学医学部位于北京，上海考生对京校认可度极高；该校在沪招生占比极小（约1人），属全国性顶尖生源竞争，不受本地保护政策影响。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: Peking University Health Science Center only has admission data in Shanghai for 2021, with the lowest ranking approximately 72 (Stomatology major, enrolling 1 student). From 2022 to 2025, admissions indicate that the university's enrollment scale in Shanghai is extremely small (usually only 1 student), with rankings consistently within the top 100 in the city, belonging to the top competitive range; the 2026 enrollment plan file did not retrieve subject-specific plan data for Peking University Health Science Center in Shanghai, and the number of students enrolled in Shanghai is very likely still 1, consistent with previous years. Due to the plan, the plan change rate is treated as 0.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Peking University Health Science Center is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, relying on the overall platform of Peking University. It ranks 2nd nationally on the Soft Science main ranking (2026), belonging to the top tier of domestic universities, with strong appeal to top Shanghai students; Peking University's reputation evaluation during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, involving campus safety, enrollment gaps, and other public opinion; but its Douyin comprehensive popularity ranks 3rd (high heat), with extremely high short video exposure, maintaining a high overall application attention level. The 2025 Hubei early batch enrollment gap has limited psychological impact on Shanghai students; Clinical Medicine A, Stomatology A, Basic Medicine A, Pharmacy A+, Nursing A+, Public Health and Preventive Medicine A, the medical discipline group strength is top nationally, with Stomatology being the major enrolled in Shanghai, discipline evaluation A level, strongly attracting high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors continue to be socially popular, with Stomatology being a hot direction; the total number of Shanghai 2026 college entrance examination candidates is approximately 66,700, a significant increase of about 35% compared to 2025 (49,276), substantially expanding the competitive base, further intensifying competition at the top level. The provincial control line (undergraduate batch 402-405) remains stable; Peking University Health Science Center is located in Beijing, and Shanghai students have a very high recognition of Beijing universities; its enrollment proportion in Shanghai is extremely small (about 1 student), belonging to national-level top student competition, unaffected by local protection policies.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering historical rankings (72 as baseline), the significant increase in total Shanghai candidates in 2026 (+35%), the sustained high popularity of medical majors, and the top disciplinary reputation of Peking University Health Science Center, it is expected that competition in 2026 will further intensify compared to 2021, with rankings slightly moving forward. The predicted lowest ranking is approximately 68, with a range of 60-76.
